'''Saleeh''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]]. The seventh planet orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Hoth's Brand]], it was named for [[Jedi Lord]] [[Saleeh]] who fought in the [[Ruusan campaign]].

{{Planet-stub}}
